launches.notes: Brand, repo, public-surface, and substrate proof exist, but first paying-customer, owner-operator, and operating-control handoff receipts are absent. POUR is not clear.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical POUR readiness gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
POUR clear requires own brand evidence, repo/public surface, first paying-customer receipt, owner-operator receipt, and operating-control handoff receipt.
This ledger is stricter than product/substrate proof and does not count a company as launched by public URL alone.
next_action: Add first paying-customer, owner-operator, and operating-control handoff receipts before marking any launch pour_clear or launched.
